fullDescription:
FreshRSS is a self-hosted RSS and Atom feed aggregator.It is lightweight, easy to work with, powerful, and customizable.

Features
- Independent Data Control : Supports self-hosted deployment, allowing users to have full control over their data without third-party reliance, ensuring privacy and security.
- Open-Source & Stable Updates : Open-source under the AGPL 3 license, with an active community. It has maintained continuous iterations and updates from 2023 to 2024, ensuring strong stability.
- Multi-Source Content Aggregation : Aggregates website RSS/Atom feeds, podcasts, and video channels. It can also scrape websites without official feeds to generate custom subscription sources.
- Efficient Content Management : Enables searching and saving queries, generating new feeds based on rules, and supports marking, favoriting, and categorizing articles for management.
- Real-Time Sync & Migration : Achieves real-time content synchronization based on WebSub, and supports importing and exporting subscription lists in OPML format.
- Flexible Customization & Permissions : Offers theme and extension customization features, as well as multi-user permission management to meet different needs.
- Full-Device & High-Efficiency Adaptation : Features a responsive design compatible with computers and mobile phones, capable of efficiently managing over 1 million articles and 50,000+ feeds.
- Multi-Language Support & Integration : Supports more than 15 languages and provides API interfaces for connecting to third-party clients or proprietary systems.
- Low-Threshold Deployment : Has a low deployment threshold, is compatible with mainstream web servers, and comes with detailed installation documentation, making it easy for beginners to get started.
name: freshrss
title: FreshRSS
upgradeDescription:
Upgrade app version to 1.28.1

This is a release focusing on bug fixing, in particular regressions from the release 1.28.0.

Selected new features:
- New customisable message for closed registrations
- Add username in Apache access logs (also in Docker logs): for GReader API, and for HTTP Basic Auth from reverse proxy

Improved performance:
- Disable counting articles in user labels for Ajax requests (unused)

Bug fixes:
- Fix unwanted expansion of user queries (saved searches) applied to filters
- Fix encoding of filter actions for labels
- Fix searching of tags
- Fix refreshing feeds with token while anonymous refresh is disabled
- Fix RSS and OPML access by token
- Fix MySQL/MariaDB transliterator_transliterate fallback
- Fix regression with MySQL/MariaDB index hint
- Fix shortcut for next unread article
- Fix custom session.cookie-lifetime
- Fix feed validator button when changing the feed URL

Full release notes: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS/releases/tag/1.28.1
